inputs.label: Volume in cups
inputs.businessContext: Input volume in US customary cups

inputs.label: Cup size
inputs.businessContext: Milliliters per cup (US customary: 236.588, US legal: 240, Metric: 250)

inputs.label: Decimal precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding

inputs.label: Batch multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Factor for scaling to multiple batches or portions

inputs.label: Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature for potential thermal expansion correction (currently not used in formula)

inputs.label: Altitude
inputs.businessContext: Altitude for potential pressure adjustment (currently not used in formula)
